AGREEMENT FOR TUITION CLASSES
Dated: 25-01-2026
As discussed and agreed upon, the 'Terms of Engagement' are listed below:
Agreement Duration: This agreement remains in force until terminated. Payments are made upon completion of every 10.00 hours.
I. Class Terms:
Class ID: 24375
i) Class for Yousef would start from 25-01-2026.
ii) Class would be of duration.
iii) You are responsible & bound for conducting a total of 10.00 hours of classes before requesting for a payment.
II. Payment Terms:
i) Yo

nducting a total of 10.00 hours of classes before requesting for a payment.
II. Payment Terms:
i) You will be paid INR 500 per hour for your services.
ii) Payment would be made within 10 working days once you raise a payment request from the edvi App
iii) At the rate of INR 500 per hour, edvi would be crediting INR 5000.00 (500 * 10.00) in your Account (Online Payment) for every cycle of 10.00 hours of classes.
Subject to TDS as mentioned in (vii) below. iv) 25-01-2026 would be considered as the

rs of classes.
Subject to TDS as mentioned in (vii) below. iv) 25-01-2026 would be considered as the Start Date of your services.
v) You can request your payment after completing 10.00 Hours of classes.
vi) It's mandatory to conduct 1 test within 10.00 Hours of classes and provide corrected answer sheets with descriptive feedback to the student.
vii) A 10% TDS will be deducted on all payments under Section 194J. If eligible, you can claim this amount when filing your tax return*. viii) If your P

r Section 194J. If eligible, you can claim this amount when filing your tax return*. viii) If your PAN is not updated or
active - 20% TDS will be applicable.
The Company reserves the right to take legal action against any Tutor who fails to provide a 30-day notice period before discontinuing classes. In such cases, the Company
may claim damages equivalent to three times the total fees payable to the Tutor under Clause I (iii) of the Class Terms.
For example: If, as per Clause I (iii), the total

he Tutor under Clause I (iii) of the Class Terms.
For example: If, as per Clause I (iii), the total hours are 10.00 and the hourly rate is INR 500, the Company may claim damages up to INR 15000.00 (10.00 * 500 * 3).
NOTE: Marking attendance on the edvi App within 48 hours after completion of each class is mandatory. If ever you miss marking the attendance, you can raise a
support ticket at support@edvi.app and edvi will mark the attendance on your behalf (subject to approval from parents.) Payme

@edvi.app and edvi will mark the attendance on your behalf (subject to approval from parents.) Payments for missed attendance might be
delayed by 15 days.
Missed attendance can only be marked within 28 days from the date of the conducted class. After this period, our support team cannot assist in marking missed
attendance, and no payout will be provided for that class.
In 81% of cases, parents often request tutor changes when tests aren't conducted. We strongly recommend consistent test-taking,

en request tutor changes when tests aren't conducted. We strongly recommend consistent test-taking, assigning homework, and providing
regular feedback to students, as this also affects your rating.
Important Note:
Please note that edvi will adjust hourly rates if a student is promoted to a new grade, subject to the following conditions:
1. The student is promoted to a new grade, AND
2. You have been tutoring the same student for the past 5 months.
Hourly rate adjustments are limited to a maximum

en tutoring the same student for the past 5 months.
Hourly rate adjustments are limited to a maximum of 10%. Tutors discontinuing classes due to concerns regarding the revision of hourly rates will be blacklisted,
and any outstanding dues may be forfeited. edvi is committed to providing high-quality and affordable online tutoring. Pressuring parents for abrupt fee revisions is
not acceptable, and we do not entertain such requests from our tutors.
